playbook.summary: Bank linking issues are usually caused by incorrect credentials, unsupported institutions, or a temporary Plaid outage.
steps: Confirm you are using your online banking username and password (not your app PIN).
Check that your bank is on our supported institutions list at nexafi.com/supported-banks.
Try unlinking and re-linking your account from Settings > Linked Accounts.
If the issue persists, check the NexaFi status page for any ongoing outages.
Contact support at support@nexafi.com with your account email and the error message you see.
playbook.follow_up_question: Can you tell me which bank you are trying to connect and what error message you are seeing?

playbook.summary: ACH transfers typically take 1-3 business days. Instant deposits may be delayed by bank-side holds.
steps: Check your transaction history under Portfolio > Activity.
ACH transfers take 1-3 business days to settle.
Instant deposit eligibility depends on your bank and account history.
If it has been more than 3 business days, contact support with your transfer confirmation number.
playbook.follow_up_question: When did you initiate the deposit and which transfer method did you use (ACH or instant)?

playbook.summary: Login issues are usually resolved by resetting your password or clearing your browser cache.
steps: Use 'Forgot Password' on the login screen to reset your credentials.
Clear your browser cache and cookies, then try again.
Ensure you are using the correct email address associated with your NexaFi account.
If your account is locked after multiple failed attempts, wait 30 minutes before retrying.
Contact support if you suspect unauthorized access.
playbook.follow_up_question: Are you seeing a specific error message when you try to log in?

playbook.summary: Pending orders may be waiting for market open, sufficient funds, or manual review.
steps: Check that your order is not a limit order waiting for a specific price.
Confirm you have sufficient buying power in your account.
Market orders placed outside trading hours (9:30am–4pm ET) execute at next market open.
Review your order status under Portfolio > Orders.
If an order has been pending for more than one trading day, contact support.
playbook.follow_up_question: What type of order did you place (market or limit) and when did you place it?

playbook.summary: Withdrawals to bank accounts typically take 1-3 business days via ACH. Delays can occur due to bank processing times or account verification holds.
steps: Check your withdrawal status under Portfolio > Activity > Withdrawals.
Standard ACH withdrawals take 1-3 business days after initiation.
Ensure your linked bank account is fully verified — unverified accounts may have withdrawal holds.
Large withdrawals (over $50,000) may require additional identity verification.
If it has been more than 5 business days, contact support with your withdrawal reference number.
playbook.follow_up_question: When did you initiate the withdrawal and what amount was it for?

playbook.summary: 2FA issues are usually caused by expired codes, time sync problems with authenticator apps, or a lost phone.
steps: SMS codes expire after 10 minutes — request a new one if yours has expired.
If using an authenticator app, ensure your phone's time is set to automatic/network time.
If you've lost access to your 2FA device, use your backup recovery codes saved during setup.
If you don't have backup codes, contact support with a government-issued ID for identity verification.
We can temporarily disable 2FA on your account after identity verification.
playbook.follow_up_question: Are you using SMS-based 2FA or an authenticator app like Google Authenticator?

playbook.summary: Portfolio data refreshes every 15 minutes during market hours. Stale data is usually resolved by a manual refresh or re-linking accounts.
steps: Pull down to refresh on mobile, or press Ctrl+R on desktop to force a data reload.
Portfolio prices update every 15 minutes during market hours (9:30am–4pm ET).
After-hours prices reflect the last traded price and update less frequently.
If linked brokerage data is stale, try unlinking and re-linking under Settings > Linked Accounts.
If the issue persists after 30 minutes, contact support with a screenshot of the incorrect data.
playbook.follow_up_question: Is the issue with live prices, your linked brokerage balance, or both?

playbook.summary: Tax documents are issued by February 15 each year. Corrections may be issued if brokerage data is amended.
steps: Tax documents (1099-B, 1099-DIV) are available under Settings > Tax Documents by February 15.
If you received a corrected 1099 from your brokerage, NexaFi will issue an amended document within 10 business days.
Cost basis discrepancies often occur when securities were transferred in from another broker — contact support to update transfer-in cost basis.
For urgent tax filing needs, contact support and we can provide a manual summary of your transactions.
NexaFi does not provide tax advice — consult a CPA for complex tax situations.
playbook.follow_up_question: Is the issue with a missing document, an incorrect amount, or a cost basis discrepancy?
